messages.content:
```python
from elasticsearch import Elasticsearch

# 8.x（推荐）：默认走 http://localhost:9200
es = Elasticsearch("http://localhost:9200")

info = es.info()
print(info["version"]["number"])      # 例如：'8.12.1'
# 也可以打印更全的信息
# print(info)
```

如果需要账号密码/HTTPS：

```python
from elasticsearch import Elasticsearch

es = Elasticsearch(
    "https://localhost:9200",
    basic_auth=("elastic", "your_password"),
    verify_certs=False,   # 测试环境可用；生产环境请配 CA
)

print(es.info()["version"]["number"])
```
